application.name: SearchPulse Agent
application.short_description: Behavior-driven search optimization engine for ServiceNow AI Search and Portal Search.
application.description: SearchPulse Agent improves Enterprise Search results by tracking user search behavior and automatically adjusting article reputation and ranking. It captures user signals, classifies session outcomes, computes article reputation scores, and influences search ranking and UI trust badges.

roles.name: x_sp_searchpulse.admin
roles.description: Full administrative access to SearchPulse tables, jobs, and dashboards.

roles.name: x_sp_searchpulse.analyst
roles.description: Read-only access to SearchPulse analytics, sessions, outcomes, and reputation records.

script_includes.name: SearchPulseClassifier
script_includes.description: Classifies search sessions into outcome types (summary_satisfied, drilled_down, result_failed, full_failure, summary_rejected, ambiguous).

script_includes.name: SearchPulseRankingEngine
script_includes.description: Provides reputation-based score multipliers and re-ranks search result sets.

script_includes.name: SearchPulseBadgeService
script_includes.description: Computes trust badge metadata (Frequently Helpful, Updated Recently, May Be Outdated) for KB articles.

scheduled_jobs.name: SearchPulseReputationJob
scheduled_jobs.description: Nightly job that classifies pending sessions and recalculates article reputation scores.

portal_widgets.name: SearchPulse Search Widget
portal_widgets.description: Full search widget with signal capture, re-ranking, and badge display.

portal_widgets.name: SearchPulse Badge Widget
portal_widgets.description: Standalone trust badge component for KB article view pages.

dashboards.name: SearchPulse Analytics
dashboards.description: Admin dashboard with top promoted/demoted articles, reformulation rate, first-click success rate, and reputation distribution.

test_data.name: Sample Data Seeder
test_data.description: Seeds 8 KB articles, 18 search sessions, and runs classification + reputation engine. Run in Scripts - Background.
